name: @quoin/docs
description: Quoin documentation site. Built with Vite multi-page + the Quoin Vite plugin so the site itself is a working demonstration of the language.

scripts.prepreview: node scripts/build-spec.js && node scripts/build-pack-catalog.js && node scripts/copy-assets.js
